title: Samsung R&D India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Samsung R&D India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
